feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC - Measure Column Script in onActive Function
entry.content:
Hi, 

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud.

I created a measure column in the story (counting a dimension). I want to filter my table using this measure column but I want to do it in the script.

We can filter the dimension column by writing: Top_Table.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Dimension_Column_Name",{value: "XX"}):;

Can we filter the measure column in script?

Thanks

entry.title: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
Hello,

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud. I have tables, numeric cards, line graphs on different pages in my story. In order to use my Month filter actively on every page and chart, I created a Calendar Model that I can link to all tables. So there are months in it and I linked it with the month column of each table. In short, I linked my Calendar Dimension to other FACT tables.

I created a common Page Filter that I can filter on each page. So when I select a month, I see the data of that month on each page. However, I want to do the following: Show 2 years of data outside of Numeric Cards, but show selected data on all numeric cards.

I guess I can summarize it like this: Is there an option to turn off a chart to filters so that the filters don't affect it? Line charts should not be affected by the selected global month filter.

Thank you

entry.title: [SAC] Values ​​using the formula RESTRICT cannot be displayed in the nodes of the value driver tree.
entry.content:
The following formula is not displayed in the nodes of the SAC value driver tree, so I would like to display it. ↓Formula that shows the value of R300000 (net assets) for the previous month
[RESTRICT([R300000], [d/YearMonth]=Previous("Month", 1))]
This formula is defined in the account dimension table of the model.

 

Set the above account in the Account section of the story

 

No value appears in the node (- is displayed) and it cannot be used for calculations, so If anyone knows, please let me know. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAC Analytic Level Password
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there any possibility to restrict Analytic Application password so whenever user will open the application then he should required to give password to access the same. Early responses would be really appreciated. 

Regards,

Abhishek Jain

entry.title: Assistance Needed with Logic for Depreciation Calculation in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Good mornin
entry.content:
Good morning,

I need help with the logic required to implement the following requirement:

I have a page related to amortizations, where there are two dates: "Acquisition Date" and "Payment Start Date." For example, if the acquisition date is 2024/01, the payment start date would be 2024/02.

The challenge is that, to calculate everything, I need to use a calculated measure:

(Acquisition Value / Useful Life) / 12

This calculated measure value must appear starting in the month of the payment start date and continue in the subsequent months going forward.

Does anyone have suggestions or guidance on the logic needed to achieve this?

entry.title: SAC connection with S4 Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are facing the issue while connecting S4 private cloud and SAC for live and acquired. Attached screenshot for your reference. Could you please check and suggest if anyone experienced the same and solution.

Regards,

Abhishek Jain

entry.title: invisible Import settings for public dimension SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi

SAP Analytical Professionals

Any idea why Import settings are not available for public dimensions in SAP Analytical cloud ? Only Model is having edit query and edit import settings options. 

 

 

regards

Mahesh

entry.title: Exam SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics (C_SAC_2421)
entry.content:
Hi Team

What is the cost of the exam - "SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics" (C_SAC_2421)

Thanks

entry.title: How to detect from a Custom Widget that I am in the story edit / design mode?
entry.content:
I want certain functionalities of my custom widget to be only available while in edit mode in the story design.

Looking at the console, it seems that there should be a way to detect it.

How can I detect that I am in the edit mode through my widget's source code?

entry.title: SAC Add dimensions as properties
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAC Help I have found these statements:

Other Enhancements

Besides the enhancements above-mentioned, the new flexible modeling approach adds the following functionalities:
  • Add dimensions as properties to single column dimensions.
  • Enable or disable planning capabilities at any time in time.

Get Started with Flexible Modeling | SAP Help Portal

I cannot find how to use dimensions as properties for another dimension.

Also, I can disable planning capabilities in one model with data, but it's disabled for another model. Both are new type with measures.

Can you clarify it, please?

Br, Oleksandr

entry.title: How to create Fiori Tracker:, tiles usage and User monitoring for SAP Fiori launchpad?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

I have followed Creat a cap  to create CAP and Fiori App, and I want now to create a fiori tracker to get statistics, who is using which apps and how long and more Details. I found some blogs such as Blog and in Github but they are not from scratch, difficult for me. I need to do this from scratch step by step to add this to my CAP and Fiori App, maybe someone know a blog which can help. Other question, do I need to integrate ABAP for my task?

 

Thank you.

Mahmood

entry.title: Delete Primary Values from Numeric Point Chart
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

in my story i have a numeric point chart with three primary values. With a button click i want to remove the three values and add two other ones.

does anybody know how i have to wright the script, that this will work?

unfortunately, everything i tried does not work.

thanks a lot.

entry.title: SAC Planning - Unable to SAVE
entry.content:
I have a SAC Planning report in Test system, and I am the only one having edit access to it. 

When I go to edit mode, make some changes, and try to save, I get the below error saying 'The story has just been updated by another user. You are now only able to save a copy of the story.'

It might have been locked by my ID itself during any previous session. Anyway I can unlock this? If I donot want to create another copy? In case if there were multiple users who had access to this report, how to identify the user that locked this?

Thank you,

Sarath Sunny

entry.title: How to avoid "Too many members created" message. Advanced formula with a variable
entry.content:
Hi

I have an issue with a fairly simple requirement for Advanced Script in a Data Action.

 I am comparing a Dimension COST_TYPE member SUPER, measure amount, for each Dimension POSITION, to COST_TYPE, member CON_CAP, measure amount, for POSITION unassigned.

If SUPER for a POSITION is greater than the CON_CAP/12 value, then post CON/CAP/12

There are many other dimensions in the model such as Employee, Cost Center, Pay Grade etc.

The gap in my understanding is this, for the "greater than" statement to work on each POSITION I thought I would need to include each dimension equal to unassigned in this part of the script, in bold below. 

RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Amount",[d/COST_TYPE]=#CAP)

if I do that, I get the message “Too many members created by PAY_RANGE, EMPLOYEE, CostCenter

So, in short how do I get records, where most of the dimensions are unassigned, to interact with records where all dimensions are assigned without the "Too many members message"?

Below is the full script

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/StartPeriod] TO [d/Version].[p/EndPeriod]

MEMBERSET [d/Audit] = "MANUAL"

 

VARIABLEMEMBER #CAP OF [d/COST_TYPE]

DATA([d/Measures]="Amount",[d/COST_TYPE]= #CAP)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Rate_Absolute",[d/COST_TYPE]="CON_CAP”)/12                                                                                                                                                                           

IF

RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/COST_TYPE] = "SUPER")>

RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Amount",[d/COST_TYPE]=#CAP)

THEN

DATA ([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/COST_TYPE] = "SUPER")=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Amount",[d/COST_TYPE]=#CAP)             

                            

ELSE 

 ENDIF

 

Thanks

Tim

entry.title: Transport SAC excel addin reports from dev system to prd system
entry.content:
Hi ,

We developed some reports in sac excel addin in dev system and  I want to  know process for transport  SAC excel reports to prd system . 

I am not found / select excel reports selection while using export option  . any one transported SAC excel addin reports from dev to prd ? Please share any inputs .

Thanks

entry.title: Number of occurrences SAP BW SAC
entry.content:
Hello!

I wonder if someone could help me with a problem I have.

I have a DSO with key article and day and it contains the days the article has been in backorder.

I have calculated the number of days the article has been in backorder, so far no problems.

But now I want to have the occasions it has been in backorder for a given timespan.

In the graph below the selected article has two occasions with backorder Nov 10 - Nov 24 and Dec 11- Dec 12.  So next to the backorder days 15, I want the number of occasions 2.

Does anyone know how I can accomplish this?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) lookup on calculated dimension based on dimension property id
entry.content:
Hi All,

Since CONCAT is not yet available in data action advanced formula. We have created a calculated dimension based on dimension "store" & "year_month". 

Based on this calculated dimension, we need to perform a lookup from another dimension in the same model, to get the store status (store status like New, renovation, closed, etc)

Hence, In SAC Dashboard (optimised story with GL accounts) , for a calculated dimension, is there a way to perform a lookup based on another dimension property attribute within the same model ?

@N1kh1l @analytics SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning @SarauShen  if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this requirement

entry.title: View the execution plan of SAC widgets/ charts
entry.content:
Hello experts,
   I currently using SAC with a Live Connection to my SAP HANA database. When I create a Chart in SAC to view my data, sometimes I get the error "Fail to fetch data" (It has occurred randomly, not all the times) <See the image attached below>.
   The chart is about getting the Top 5 Best Sales Products by Quantity. The data source has about 2 million rows of data, and the Chart also uses the filter to remove the unnecessary products. I wonder whether the errors occurred because my server did not meet the resource requirement to query the data or because it was a SAC issue. So I want to view the execution plan, and query of each Chart/ Widget to run that query under my HANA server. Is there any solution? ( I found that SAC only has the Analyze Story Performance in View Time option to track the time of each Widget, but does not have the execution plan).
I appreciate your help.
Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: How to Handle Dimension Display Options (ID, Description, ID + Description) in R-Scripting
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using R Visualizations in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and would like to dynamically control how dimension values are displayed on the x-axis based on their Display Options:

  1. ID Only
  2. Description Only
  3. ID and Description

In standard SAC charts, this behavior is handled by setting the display option for the dimension. However, I am not sure how to replicate this functionality in an R Visualization.

For example:

  • Dimension ID: A, B, C
  • Dimension Description: Alpha, Beta, Gamma

I want to visualize these in R with the following behaviors:

  1. X-axis shows ID only (A, B, C).
  2. X-axis shows Description only (Alpha, Beta, Gamma).
  3. X-axis shows both ID and Description combined (A - Alpha, B - Beta, C - Gamma).

Could anyone guide me on how to implement this using R-scripting in SAC? Specifically, how do I map or transform the dimension values to achieve this flexibility in R?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to add equipment in logsheet
entry.content:
Equipment was not displayed in the logsheet because, during the equipment transfer process, the location status was mistakenly set to 'dismantled' from 12.11.2024. The equipment's final location was marked as 'installed' only on 28.11.2024. As result, the logsheet does not show data for 16 days.

Please suggest what actions should be taken to resolve this issue.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Plant Connectivity
